bio_en: Attila Lindner is Professor of Economics at University College London. He studies labor markets, with a focus on how policies such as minimum wages and payroll taxes affect workers, firms, and prices. Much of his empirical work uses Hungarian administrative data. His research has appeared in the American Economic Review, the Quarterly Journal of Economics, and the Review of Economic Studies.
bio_hu: Lindner Attila a University College London közgazdaságtan professzora. A munkaerőpiacot kutatja, különös tekintettel arra, hogyan hatnak a minimálbér és a bérterhek a munkavállalókra, a vállalatokra és az árakra. Empirikus munkáinak jelentős része magyar adminisztratív adatokon alapul. Kutatásai megjelentek az American Economic Review-ban, a Quarterly Journal of Economicsban és a Review of Economic Studies-ban.

qualifying_publication.title: Who Pays for the Minimum Wage?
